title: Expose a stable capabilities JSON contract
rationale: Agents need deterministic self-discovery without scraping help text.

title: Make bare/help invocation successful and useful
rationale: First contact should not look like a failure when the user or agent is discovering the CLI.

title: Add a compact robot guide
rationale: Agents need a short operational path for discovery, local attach, health checks, and danger gates.

title: Improve unknown-command errors with likely intent suggestions
rationale: Typo-aware hints reduce dead ends for common agent discovery attempts.

title: Normalize subcommand help and JSON error contracts
rationale: Nested command families still use mixed usage/error patterns.
